## 📌 Summary
<!-- What does this PR do? Keep it concise but precise -->
- Feature / Fix / Refactor:
- Business context:
- Related ticket:

## 🔗 Work Item / Traceability
<!-- Mandatory for audit -->
- Jira / Azure DevOps ID: 
- Link: 

## 🧩 Change Type
<!-- Select all that apply -->
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance Improvement
- [ ] Security Improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Infrastructure / DevOps

## 🏗️ Architecture Impact
<!-- Required for system integrity -->
- Affected services:
- API changes: Yes / No
- Database changes: Yes / No
- Backward compatibility: Yes / No

## 🔐 Security Checklist (Zero Trust)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Uses Managed Identity / OIDC where applicable
- [ ] RBAC permissions follow least privilege
- [ ] Input validation enforced
- [ ] Sensitive data encrypted (at rest / in transit)
- [ ] No PII exposed in logs

## ⚙️ CI/CD & Deployment
- [ ] Pipeline updated (if required)
- [ ] IaC changes validated (Bicep/Terraform)
- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Feature flags used (if applicable)
- [ ] Deployment is fully automated (no manual steps)

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Security scans passed (SAST, SCA, secrets)
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Test Evidence
<!-- Attach logs, screenshots, or pipeline run links -->
- Pipeline Run:
- Test Results:

## 📦 Artifact & Supply Chain
- [ ] SBOM generated
- [ ] Artifact signed
- [ ] Dependencies reviewed (no critical vulnerabilities)

## 📊 Observability
- [ ] Logging added/updated
- [ ] Metrics added (if applicable)
- [ ] Alerts configured (if required)

## 🔄 Rollback Plan
<!-- Must be deterministic -->
- Rollback strategy:
- Data rollback required: Yes / No

## 🚨 Risks & Mitigations
<!-- Be explicit -->
- Risk:
- Mitigation:

## 👀 Review Checklist
- [ ] Code follows standards
- [ ] No breaking changes without versioning
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Approved by required reviewers

## 🧾 Additional Notes
<!-- Anything reviewers should know -->
